name: Grim Clause Co.
specialty: Expert negotiators with a knack for handling delicate matters and navigating the Undercity's complex politics, setting them apart from other Glass Sigil crews

members.name: Vexa Vendetta
members.note: A scar running down her left cheek from a past encounter, a constant reminder of her past failures

members.name: Jax Slate
members.note: His eyes, a piercing silver, are said to see through lies and deception

visual: Vexa and Jax wear tailored, dark leather coats, concealing their weapons beneath. They carry themselves with an air of authority, their heads held high despite the grimy surroundings. A crystal pendant, emblem of the Glass Sigil, is visible around Vexa's neck.
reputation_note: Whispers in the Undercity claim they've turned down bribes from the Wardens of Ash and the Iron Fang Consortium, refusing to be swayed by anyone but their clients. Be cautious when dealing with them, for they're known to be ruthless when crossed.
